## Analyzers (1)

### [Ldap_Query v3.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/LdapQuery/LdapQuery.json)
Query your LDAP server to harvest informations about an user of your organization

- **Author:** Florian Perret @cyber_pescadito & THA-CERT @tha_cert
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `username`, `mail`
